text.title: Schedule Development Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: CPM trace for 10-activity project
example.note: DAG of 10 activities with PERT triples. critical-path.py forward pass: ES/EF; backward pass: LS/LF; float=LF-EF. Critical path = T1→T3→T6→T9 (float=0). Near-critical = T1→T3→T7→T9 (float=1.5d). Monte Carlo (N=10000) P50=42 days, P80=48 days, P95=53 days. Project buffer at end = 5 days.
